sections.responsibilities: responsibilities * Building and leading a team that continually maintains leading\-edge expertise in AI, GenAI and Agentic AI transformation in HCLS * Counseling HCLS executive customers to explore the art of the possible with AI and to push the frontiers of innovation to achieve breakthrough outcomes * Collaborating with internal teams, including GenAI Innovation Center, Applied AI team, and the HCLS Sales team to innovate AWS solutions, services, accelerators, and demos to meet evolving customer needs * Designing complex, scalable, and secure AWS AI, GenAI and Agentic AI solutions to achieve customer business outcomes (CBOs) * Driving large complex opportunities, either personally or through your team, from ideation, through vision building and scoping, all the way to closure and participate in the delivery * Acting as a thought leader and trusted advisor to customers and internal colleagues on industry AI, GenAI, Agentic AI trends and emerging technologies About the team About AWS: Diverse
sections.requirements: qualifications and skills listed in the job below, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative QUALIFICATIONS** ------------------------ * 7\+ years of working with Data \& AI related technologies, including, but not limited to, AI/ML, GenAI, Analytics, Database, and/or Storage QUALIFICATIONS** ---------------------------- * Knowledge of security and compliance standards including HIPAA and GDPR * Advanced technology degree or AWS Professional level certifications (e.g., Solutions Architect Professional, DevOps Engineer Professional, GenAI Developer Professional) preferred * Deep understanding of AWS services, including Bedrock, AgentCore, SageMaker, Kiro, and compute, storage, networking, security, databases, machine learning, and serverless technologies * Excellent communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to both technical and non\-technical audiences as part of pre\-sales motion * qualifications, and location. Amazon also offers comprehensive
sections.experience: experienced technology leader to build our Healthcare and Life Sciences (HCLS) Agentic AI Specialist Team. This is a team of ProServe Cloud Architects (PCAs) with expertise at the intersection of HCLS domains (e.g. Research, Clinical Development, Commercial, Manufacturing, Enterprise IT) and AI, GenAI and Agentic AI. In this position, you'll counsel senior HCLS executives on designing AI transformation programs that deliver business outcomes. You'll develop perspectives on how AI, GenAI, and Agentic AI unlock business value, creating repeatable partnership models and tools that scale across industry customers. You'll collaborate with colleagues in the ProServe HCLS team, GenAI Innovation Center, and external Partners, working backwards from customer outcomes to design fit\-for\-purpose solutions and programs. This role requires expertise in AI, GenAI, and Agentic AI within HCLS, paired with experience in business development or professional services. You think big, innovate, focus on customer objectives, execute at high standards, and maintain continuous curiosity. Key job Experiences: AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying. Why AWS? Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses. Inclusive Team Culture \- Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness. Mentorship \& Career Growth \- We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional. Work/Life Balance \- We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud. 10044**BASIC experience * 7\+ years of solving problems with technology in the Healthcare/Life Sciences Industry experience * 3\+ years of team leadership experience * Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field * 5\+ years Professional services business development and/or technology sales experience **PREFERRED Experience shaping large, complex AI, GenAI and Agentic AI transformation programs in HCLS Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner. The base salary range for this position is listed below. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative QUALIFICATIONS** ------------------------ * 7\+ years of working with Data \& AI related technologies, including, but not limited to, AI/ML, GenAI, Analytics, Database, and/or Storage QUALIFICATIONS** ---------------------------- * Knowledge of security and compliance standards including HIPAA and GDPR * Advanced technology degree or AWS Professional level certifications (e.g., Solutions Architect Professional, DevOps Engineer Professional, GenAI Developer Professional) preferred * Deep understanding of AWS services, including Bedrock, AgentCore, SageMaker, Kiro, and compute, storage, networking, security, databases, machine learning, and serverless technologies * Excellent communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to both technical and non\-technical audiences as part of pre\-sales motion * qualifications, and location. Amazon also offers comprehensive
sections.experience: experienced technology leader to build our Healthcare and Life Sciences (HCLS) Agentic AI Specialist Team. This is a team of ProServe Cloud Architects (PCAs) with expertise at the intersection of HCLS domains (e.g. Research, Clinical Development, Commercial, Manufacturing, Enterprise IT) and AI, GenAI and Agentic AI. In this position, you'll counsel senior HCLS executives on designing AI transformation programs that deliver business outcomes. You'll develop perspectives on how AI, GenAI, and Agentic AI unlock business value, creating repeatable partnership models and tools that scale across industry customers. You'll collaborate with colleagues in the ProServe HCLS team, GenAI Innovation Center, and external Partners, working backwards from customer outcomes to design fit\-for\-purpose solutions and programs. This role requires expertise in AI, GenAI, and Agentic AI within HCLS, paired with experience in business development or professional services. You think big, innovate, focus on customer objectives, execute at high standards, and maintain continuous curiosity. Key job Experiences: AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying. Why AWS? Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses. Inclusive Team Culture \- Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness. Mentorship \& Career Growth \- We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional. Work/Life Balance \- We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud. 10044**BASIC experience * 7\+ years of solving problems with technology in the Healthcare/Life Sciences Industry experience * 3\+ years of team leadership experience * Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field * 5\+ years Professional services business development and/or technology sales experience **PREFERRED Experience shaping large, complex AI, GenAI and Agentic AI transformation programs in HCLS Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner. The base salary range for this position is listed below. Your Amazon package will include sign\-on payments and restricted stock units (RSUs). Final experience,

sections.responsibilities: responsibilities In this role, you'll participate in the end\-to\-end design process for complex features and product. You'll develop early\-stage concepts that help stakeholders and leaders deeply understand the customer duties for this position include: work safely and cooperatively with other employees, supervisors, and staff; adhere to standards of excellence despite stressful conditions; communicate effectively and respectfully with employees, supervisors, and staff to ensure exceptional customer service; and follow all federal, state, and local laws and Company policies. Criminal history may have a direct, adverse, and negative relationship with some of the material job duties of this position. These include the duties and responsibilities listed above, as well as the abilities to adhere to company policies, exercise sound judgment, effectively manage stress and work safely and respectfully with others, exhibit trustworthiness and professionalism, and safeguard business operations and the Company’s reputation. Pursuant to the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner. The base salary range for this position is listed below. Your Amazon package will include sign\-on payments and restricted stock units (RSUs). Final
sections.requirements: QUALIFICATIONS** ------------------------ * 7\+ years of design QUALIFICATIONS** ---------------------------- * qualifications, and location. Amazon also offers comprehensive
sections.experience: experiences. Key job experience while collaborating with engineers throughout the design process. You'll routinely partner with designers across Alexa to both adopt and extend existing design systems. As you develop new patterns and uncover best practices, you'll contribute to Figma libraries and share what you've learned with your peers. You will also be responsible for incorporating insights from relevant Alexa research, conducting hallway testing, and participating in user research to inform and validate your decisions. Along the way, you'll partner with peer designers, product and tech owners, marketing, solutions architects, and business development to be sure the customer remains at the center of our decision\-making. This role will provide opportunities to expand your skills, practice growing your influence, and delivering best\-in\-class experiences for both businesses and end customers. A day in the life In this role, you'll design net\-new concepts that make life more enjoyable for our customers, dream up new ways of solving long\-standing problems, and partner with solutions architects, tech teams, and business development to refine our product offerings and secure new commitments from our business partners. One week you might run user research to test how customers interpret and respond to the experience you're designing while another week you might partner with a solutions architect to build a working prototype for a conversational experience. No matter what, you'll operate with enough autonomy to grow and challenge yourself while being supported by a collaborative design team. About the team The Alexa Enterprise charter is to build and enable indispensable, frustration\-free, Alexa experiences for enterprises worldwide – starting with digital entertainment, hotels and hospitality, aging, and healthcare. We build a portfolio of B2B2C software\-as\-a\-service (SAAS) products that empower developers and enterprise companies to support their staff and delight their customers with Alexa. We also provide ready\-made solutions that let device makers bring Alexa to their products with our Alexa Built\-In program. We serve world\-class partners such as Samsung, LG, Bose, Disney, Wynn Resorts, Hard Rock Hotels, Atria Senior Living, Spanish Red Cross, and BayCare Hospitals. Our products have been featured in publications such as CNET and Forbes, and Amazon has celebrated our progress in its quarterly earnings highlights. Customers have told us: "You have saved lives" and "helped our residents connect with their families." Our team values work\-life harmony and a diversity of lifestyles and family schedules. We love solving ambiguous problems for our customers by diving deep to understand our customers, Invent and Simplify, Think Big, Deliver Results, and Earn Trust. **BASIC experience * Have an available online portfolio * Experience working with stakeholders to plan and execute programs that are strategic in nature * Experience in delivering design solutions for projects of large scope and complexity **PREFERRED Experience with UX design of complex workflows * Experience acquiring user data (e.g., conducting usability studies, performing user research) and creating personas and journey maps * Experience defining and maintaining design patterns and UX standards Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Los Angeles County applicants: Job experience,

sections.responsibilities: Responsibilities:** * Oversee the survey, design, and implementation of communication‑related ISP/OSP infrastructure, including fiber and copper plants, pathways, power integration (with licensed electricians), patch panels, and system diagrams. * Support communication system modernization projects of varying size and complexity, including preliminary development of the SPRIP. * Conduct and oversee site surveys, documenting current communication configurations and designing optimized ISP/OSP and transport architectures. * Approve SDPs and Final RIP documents, ensuring compliance with Army communication
sections.requirements: requirements, NEC standards, and industry best practices. * Support development of IUID Marking Plans and procurement documentation (LOM). * Lead and supervise deployment teams across survey, installation, testing, and QA activities, including all pre‑implementation coordination. * Approve engineering implementation plans, system drawings, and communication infrastructure layouts; perform quality checks and enforce safe work practices. * Identify and resolve complex communication engineering issues; oversee system pre‑tests and acceptance testing. * Ensure communication system installations align with safety standards, environmental conditions, and operational needs. * Provide technical subject‑matter expertise across multiple projects, supporting communication architecture decisions and modernization efforts. * Optimize communication system resources, scalability, and performance. * Maintain comprehensive documentation of communication system configurations, procedures, and troubleshooting steps. * Prepare system performance reports, issue tracking summaries, and recommendations for enhancements. * Troubleshoot complex communication problems and collaborate with cross‑functional engineering teams. * Provide daily supervision, guidance, and technical leadership to ISP/OSP and communication engineering staff. ** Qualifications:** *Required:* * U.S. citizenship with ability to obtain a Secret security clearance * Technical BA/BS degree; Master’s preferred (equivalent
sections.experience: experience accepted) * Completed OSHA 30\-hour training * 12 years of experience as a Lead Wired Engineer, Communication Engineer, or similar role supporting large, complex communication networks * Commensurate alternative: High school diploma or associate degree plus 15 years of relevant experience * Ability to travel both CONUS and OCONUS * Strong analytical and problem‑solving abilities * Excellent communication and interpersonal skills *Desired:* * Active Secret security clearance * Experience in a fast‑paced, mission‑critical communication environment * Experience supporting DoD communication modernization projects * Certifications: BICSI RCDD (preferred/required per hiring need) * Proficiency in MS Office Suite, Visio, AutoCAD, and related engineering tools * **What You Can Expect:** **A culture of integrity.** At CACI, we place character and innovation at the center of everything we do. As a valued team member, you’ll be part of a high\-performing group dedicated to our customer’s missions and driven by a higher purpose – to ensure the safety of our nation. **An environment of trust.** CACI values the unique contributions that every employee brings to our company and our customers \- every day. You’ll have the autonomy to take the time you need through a unique flexible time off benefit and have access to robust learning resources to make your ambitions a reality. **A focus on continuous growth.** Together, we will advance our nation's most critical missions, build on our lengthy track record of business success, and find opportunities to break new ground — in your career and in our legacy. **Pay Range**: There are a host of factors that can influence final salary including, but not limited to, geographic location, Federal Government contract labor categories and contract wage rates, relevant prior work experience, specific skills and competencies, education, and certifications. Our employees value the flexibility at CACI that allows them to balance quality work and their personal lives. We offer competitive
sections.benefits: compensation, benefits and learning and development opportunities. Our broad and competitive mix of benefits options is designed to support and protect employees and their families. At CACI, you will receive comprehensive benefits such as; healthcare, wellness, financial, retirement, family support, continuing education, and time off benefits. The proposed salary range for this position is: $85,800 \- $180,200*CACI is* *an Equal Opportunity Employer.* *All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, age, national origin, disability, status as a protected veteran, or any* *other protected characteristic.*

sections.responsibilities: Responsibilities:** The selected candidate will be responsible for design, development, modification, and evaluation of complex antennas and front\-end modules for receiving signals to include radar and communications prototype development systems. The candidate will be instrumental in the system engineering and advanced research and development associated with designing of products during pre\-delivery design, integration, and acceptance. Duties will include technical responsibility for planning and executing technical programs, projects, or phases of projects to include customer interface,
sections.requirements: requirements development, design reviews, and technical interchanges, and all aspects of prototype/product system design, development, demonstration, and evaluation. * Analyze, design, develop, and maintain products; assist in commercialization * Understand current product portfolio to enhance product line and generate creativity in potential new products that service our industry * Build prototypes, products, and systems for testing; set up and run laboratory simulations * Troubleshoot electrical issues to help support production areas * Conduct and/or participate in technical reviews of requirements, specifications, designs, codes, and other tasks involved in product development * Support engineering design reviews with other engineers, Design Reviews (PDR/CDR), Test Readiness Reviews (TRR) * Author interface control documents for systems and subsystems * Create schematics and BOMs for products * Analyze data to improve current systems and products * Be part of a team to establish system architecture * Lead technical execution of electrical engineering principles * Assist in generation of technical content of white paper for proposal development as required ** Qualifications:** *Required:* * BSEE (MSEE desired) and minimum of 7 years of RF antenna design
sections.experience: experience * Experience in Antenna and RF systems design including RF cascade analysis to identify compression points, system gain, sensitivity, and dynamic range * Experience with analog and digital RF circuits design, fabrication, and assembly * Experience with Anechoic Chamber operations for obtaining antenna gain measurements * Experience utilizing lab equipment including Network Analyzers, Signal Analyzers, Signal Generators, Oscilloscopes, and custom test equipment * Knowledge or experience with simulating RF circuits for gain, NF, P1dBm, etc. * Familiarization with Electromagnetic (RF) propagation and systems * Experience designing and supporting fabrication and assembling of PCBs containing surface mount and through\-hole components * Experience with schematic capture and PCB layout *Desired:* * Active TS/SCI clearance * Master’s degree in electrical engineering * Experience leading development * **What You Can Expect:** **A culture of integrity.** At CACI, we place character and innovation at the center of everything we do. As a valued team member, you’ll be part of a high\-performing group dedicated to our customer’s missions and driven by a higher purpose – to ensure the safety of our nation. **An environment of trust.** CACI values the unique contributions that every employee brings to our company and our customers \- every day. sections.about: About the Role: As the Regional Automation Engineer, you will engage on all aspects of high\-level support for the control systems within a region of Amazon sites. This work takes the form of direct field engagement for launch and existing facilities, commissioning, on\-call, continuous improvement, change management, project management, training, security, infrastructure and systems administration. You will deliver this through the use of statistics and data analytics, structured problem solving, implementation of global support mechanisms, system performance monitoring tools, identification and dissemination of best practices. In this role, you will also develop and implement standard operating procedures, optimal code/parameter sets, performance metrics, and feedback mechanisms to ensure reliability and operational efficiency of our equipment. What Do We Offer? Amazon offers competitive

sections.responsibilities: responsibilities Key job responsibilities include, but are not limited to: * You will troubleshoot material handling control systems, including PLC/PC controllers, industrial networks (Ethernet, ControlNet, DeviceNet, Profibus, Profinet, ASi), motor control systems, servo drives, frequency drives, and electrical distribution systems * You will apply Subject Matter Expertise (SME) on troubleshooting and dive deeps for engineering issues, supporting a region of onsite automation engineers to investigate the root cause and planning actions to eliminate/mitigate the downtime of critical assets * You will provide technical guidance and decision making for collaboration projects or initiatives with other Amazon teams, being a key stakeholder in supporting technical and major network support requests * You will provide escalation support to onsite automation engineers, during and after business hours, troubleshooting locally and remotely, to ensure that all hardware or controls software within the building is repaired on time * You will travel up to 80% to support sites within an assigned region **BASIC duties for this position include: work safely and cooperatively with other employees, supervisors, and staff; adhere to standards of excellence despite stressful conditions; communicate effectively and respectfully with employees, supervisors, and staff to ensure exceptional customer service; and follow all federal, state, and local laws and Company policies. Criminal history may have a direct, adverse, and negative relationship with some of the material job duties of this position. These include the duties and responsibilities listed above, as well as the abilities to adhere to company policies, exercise sound judgment, effectively manage stress and work safely and respectfully with others, exhibit trustworthiness and professionalism, and safeguard business operations and the Company’s reputation. Pursuant to the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner. The base salary range for this position is listed below. Your Amazon package will include sign\-on payments and restricted stock units (RSUs). Final
sections.requirements: QUALIFICATIONS** ------------------------ * Bachelor's degree in computer science, electrical engineering, automation engineering, or equivalent, or 4\+ years of PLC programming or automation engineering QUALIFICATIONS** ---------------------------- * Master's degree in computer science, electrical engineering, automation engineering, or equivalent * Master's degree, or Six Sigma Black Belt certification * qualifications, and location. Amazon also offers comprehensive
sections.experience: experience * Work a flexible schedule/shift/work area, including weekends, nights, and/or holidays * 4\+ years of process or production environment related PLC\-controlled automation and issue diagnosis experience * 4\+ years of Siemens, Allen\-Bradley or Codesys Ladder Logic and structure programming experience * 4\+ years of robotics work cells and control systems experience * 4\+ years of electrical theory, robotics, controls components, and automated equipment experience * Travel up to 80% of the time **PREFERRED Experience leading controls in manufacturing or complex industrial environments * Experience identifying, maintaining, troubleshooting, and modifying Motor Controls including motor starters, Variable Frequency Drives, DC drives, and standard electrical components * Experience interpreting and modifying mechanical and electrical drawings Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Los Angeles County applicants: Job experience,
sections.benefits: compensation packages including comprehensive healthcare benefits starting on Day 1, matching 401(k) program, and up to 20 weeks of paid parental leave. But wait, there’s more: We provide lightweight fire\-resistant daily wear and composite toe safety shoes for your safety! Key job compensation will be determined based on factors including benefits including health insurance (medical, dental, vision, prescription, Basic Life \& AD\&D insurance and option for Supplemental life plans, EAP, Mental Health Support, Medical Advice Line, Flexible Spending Accounts, Adoption and Surrogacy Reimbursement coverage), 401(k) matching, paid time off, and parental leave. Learn more about our benefits at https://amazon.jobs/en/ benefits.
